title: Battle of Iktotch
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Mission to Nivek]] |conc= |next=[[Battle of Terra Sool]] |image=[[File:Battle_of_Iktotch2.jpg]] |name=Battle of Iktotch |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.6 BBY]] (13:10) |place=[[Iktotch/Legends|Iktotch]] |result=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] victory |side1=Galactic Republic |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*2 [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] *[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] *[[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]] *[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantrys]] |forces2=*[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s *[[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] *[[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|IG-227 ''Hailfire''-class droid tanks]] *[[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]] *1 [[B3 ultra battle droid]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Unknown number of clone troopers |casual2=Many battle droids |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Weapons didn't win this battle... The Jedi did.|[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]|{{CWACite|1|Heavy Metal Jedi}}}} The '''Battle of Iktotch''' was a minor battle fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|You can't smash your way through the droid army...''"
"''Watch me.|Mace Windu and Saesee Tiin|}} [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]—himself an [[Iktotchi/Legends|Iktotchi]]—arrived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to free it from the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. They saw that they had different uses of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], talking about precision and power. At the beginning of the battle, the two Jedi Masters [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force Pushed]] [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], Windu destroying a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s. Along with clone troopers, the Jedi advanced. They then crushed a Super Battle Droid into a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|''Hailfire'' droid]]. [[File:Ultra_battle_droid.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] face a [[B3 ultra battle droid]].]] Just when the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] began searching the Command Center, a prototype [[B3 ultra battle droid|ultra battle droid]] that the Separatists had created appeared. The droid opened fire and killed a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]], and the two Jedi thought of a strategy to defeat it. They then destroyed the droid one piece at a time: first, they destroyed its [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], then hit its knees. At this point, the droid launched some [[Homing missile/Legends|homing missiles]], but the Jedi used the Force to change the course of the missiles, making them detonate on the droid, which surprisingly survived. However, the Jedi quickly finished it, using a combination of speed and strength, managing to free [[Iktotch/Legends|Iktotch]] and understanding that both precision and power are needed. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|1|Heavy Metal Jedi}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|saeseetiin|Tiin, Saesee}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht um Iktotch |es=Batalla de Iktotch |nl=Battle of Iktotch |pl=Bitwa o Iktotch }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Iktotch, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles in the Narvath sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
